name: Tzatzika
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cucumber, peeled and grated (leave about 1/3 of the peel for color)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash cucumber and partially peel (leave about 1/3 of the peel for color). Grate the cucumber.
2. Drain cucumber and onion in a strainer and press to remove excess moisture.
3. Add remaining ingredients (dill, sour cream, yogurt) to the mixture and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Chill well before serving.
5. Serve with Greek olives and pita triangles. Makes 2 cups or 8 servings.
